# remnawave_internal_squads (Data Source)

Lists all Remnawave internal squads. Use this to discover existing squad UUIDs and inbound assignments for brownfield import. Accessible node UUIDs are derived from each squad's inbound configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_internal_squads" "all" {}

output "all_internal_squads" {
  value = data.remnawave_internal_squads.all.internal_squads
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `internal_squads` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--internal_squads))

<a id="nestedatt--internal_squads"></a>
### Nested Schema for `internal_squads`

Read-Only:

- `accessible_node_uuids` (List of String) Read-only list of node UUIDs reachable through the squad's inbounds.
- `inbounds` (Set of String) Set of config profile inbound UUIDs assigned to the squad.
- `name` (String) Internal squad name.
- `uuid` (String) Internal squad UUID.
